name: TridentSynth Live Best Pathway Runner
description: Submits a live TridentSynth job, waits for the result page, parses the best pathway, and returns a clean text_summary plus structured fields including PKS modules, synthesis parameters, selected steps, PKS product SMILES, final product SMILES, reaction SMILES, reaction rules, reaction enthalpy, feasibility scores, and pathway structures as SMILES.

inputs.name: target_smiles
inputs.description: Single target-molecule SMILES string. TridentSynth accepts one molecule at a time.

inputs.name: use_pks
inputs.description: Whether to include the PKS synthesis strategy. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: use_bio
inputs.description: Whether to include the biological synthesis/tailoring strategy. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: use_chem
inputs.description: Whether to include the chemical synthesis/tailoring strategy. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: max_bio_steps
inputs.description: Maximum number of biological steps to search. Allowed values: 1, 2, or 3.

inputs.name: max_chem_steps
inputs.description: Maximum number of chemical steps to search. Allowed values: 1, 2, or 3.

inputs.name: pks_release_mechanism
inputs.description: PKS release mechanism. Allowed values: thiolysis or cyclization.

inputs.name: pks_starters
inputs.description: Optional PKS starter substrates. Supported values include malonyl-CoA, methylmalonyl-CoA, allylmalonyl-CoA, methoxymalonyl-CoA, and hydroxymalonyl-CoA.

inputs.name: pks_extenders
inputs.description: Optional PKS extender substrates. Supported values include malonyl-CoA, methylmalonyl-CoA, ethylmalonyl-CoA, methoxymalonyl-CoA, and allylmalonyl-CoA.

inputs.name: max_carbon
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet max carbon atom filter.

inputs.name: max_nitrogen
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet max nitrogen atom filter.

inputs.name: max_oxygen
inputs.description: Optional DORAnet max oxygen atom filter.

inputs.name: auto_optimize_unspecified
inputs.description: If true, fills missing optional settings with a compact exploratory setup. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: wait_for_completion
inputs.description: If true, polls TridentSynth until the results page is complete and parses the best pathway. Defaults to true.

inputs.name: timeout_seconds
inputs.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for the TridentSynth job to complete. Defaults to 600.

inputs.name: poll_seconds
inputs.description: Seconds between polling attempts while waiting for results. Defaults to 5.

inputs.name: acknowledge_controlled_substance_warning
inputs.description: If the site returns its controlled-substance warning, continue only if this is true. Defaults to false.

outputs.description: Structured result containing ok/status, task ID, submitted query, and result. The nested result contains text_summary, synthesis_parameters, selected_steps, pks_modules, domain_legend, and best_pathway. best_pathway includes pks_product_smiles, pks_similarity_to_target, post_pks_product_smiles, post_pks_similarity_to_target, net_feasibility, reaction_smiles, reaction_structures, reaction_rule_ids, reaction_rule_names, reaction_enthalpies, step_feasibilities, and pathway_structures_smiles.

result.text_summary:
TridentSynth result
- Target SMILES: CCCCCC
- Strategy: PKS, Chemical synthesis
- PKS termination: thiolysis
- Selected steps: Chemical steps: 1

PKS modules:
- Module 1 (Loading module): KSq, AT substrate Methylmalonyl-CoA, ACP

Best pathway:
- PKS product SMILES: CCCCCCC(=O)O
- Final product SMILES: CCCCCC
- Final product similarity to target: 1.0
- Reaction SMILES: CCCCCCC(=O)O>>CCCCCC.O=C=O
- Reaction details: rule = Carboxylic Acids Decarboxylation, enthalpy = -6.19 kcal/mol
- Pathway structures SMILES: CCCCCCC(=O)O, CCCCCC, O=C=O

pks_modules.text_summary: Module 1 (Loading module): KSq, AT substrate Methylmalonyl-CoA, ACP

examples.notes: Example of PKS plus one chemical step for hexane. text_summary is intended to be displayed directly by Gemini.

trigger_phrases: find a PKS plus chemical pathway
find a PKS plus biological pathway
get the PKS modules from TridentSynth
predict a PKS pathway with TridentSynth
find reaction SMILES for the TridentSynth pathway
